== Notes for [[Item:Q88039|Q88039]] ==

'''Numerius Julius Caesar''' (c300 BCE-?), son of Lucius Julius Libo II and grandson of Lucius Julius Libo I (Consul 267 BCE). He was first of the Caesars. The word ''Caesar'' originally meant "a fine head of hair".

--------------------

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Numerius_Julius_Caesar

=Julii Caesares=

* Grandfather: Lucius Julius Libo (consul 267 BC)
* Father: `--Lucius Julius Libo II
* `--'''Numerius Julius Caesar (b. bef. 300 BC)'''
* Son: `--Lucius Julius Caesar I

Lucius Julius Julus was the son of Numerius Julius Julus. There is thenanother gap of about 560 years separating him from Julus, who was the sonof Ascanius, who was the son of Aeneas, famous hero of The Iliad and TheAenead.

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I04940
# ID: I04940
# Name: Numerius Julius CAESAR 1 2 3 4 5
# Sex: M
# Birth: BEF 100 1 2 3 4 5
# Death: BEF 100 1 2 3 4 5
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 5
# Change Date: 15 OCT 2001 2 3 4 5
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004


[daveanthes.FTW]

Numerius Julius Caesar, the first of the Caesars lived about 300 B.C.The word "Caesar" originally meant "a hairy head"; some say "anelephant."



Father: Julius ancestors CEASAR

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown

Children

1. Has Children Lucius Julias CAESAR b: BEF 100


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: 21 Jan 2004
5. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004


wtf 4:565

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
